creator: void@f-m.fm
text:
(In reply to roberthuff from comment #4)

I also get the same error as you when building directly from the ports tree

root@rpi4:/usr/ports/ports-mgmt/pkg-provides# make clean
ld-elf.so.1: /usr/local/lib/pkg//provides.so: Undefined symbol "pkg_plugin_set"
make: "/usr/ports/Mk/bsd.port.mk" line 1222: warning: "/usr/local/sbin/pkg-static version -t 1.19.0 1.17.0" returned non-zero status
ld-elf.so.1: /usr/local/lib/pkg//provides.so: Undefined symbol "pkg_plugin_set"
make: "/usr/ports/Mk/bsd.port.mk" line 1229: warning: "/usr/local/sbin/pkg-static version -t 1.19.0 1.17.2" returned non-zero status
===>  Cleaning for pkg-provides-0.7.3

this is on arm64 13.1-p3 with ports tree refreshed at approx 1900 UTC
